narrative:
Jefferson Township has 13,422 registered voters, with 57.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.4%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.4 percentage points.
